title: hieracium membranulatum
intro: Hieracium membranulatum, also known as the sticky hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Hieracium membranulatum include its potential to improve digestion, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
